message:
feat(telemetry): Add SpeedScore calculation engine

Implements unified performance scoring combining all benchmark results:
- CPU (30%), Memory (15%), Disk (20%), Network (15%), Compilation (20%)
- Normalizes raw metrics to 0-100 scale with proper handling for
  lower-is-better vs higher-is-better metrics
- Provides letter grades (S/A/B/C/D/F) and quality tiers
- Includes 13 comprehensive unit tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
